value.found_quote: [Move tasks between web and terminal](#move-tasks-between-web-and-terminal) with `--remote` and `--teleport`
value.rationale: The page explicitly lists "Move tasks between web and terminal" as a section, describing moving sessions between web and terminal using --remote and --teleport. It also describes /web-setup being run in the terminal. The feature is part of Claude Code on the web, which the page states is "in research preview."
